overview.value: Echeveria is a compact rosette succulent with powdery leaves. It needs strong light and dry soil to stay colorful and symmetrical.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Echeveria","overview":"Echeveria is a compact rosette succulent with powdery leaves. It needs strong light and dry soil to stay colorful and symmetrical.","tips":"If the rosette stretches upward, it needs more light."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"拟石莲花","overview":"拟石莲花是紧凑莲座状多肉，叶片带粉感。它需要强光和偏干土壤，才能保持颜色和对称株型。","tips":"如果莲座开始向上拉长，通常说明光照不足。"}}
